overview.description: The Invesco International Corporate Bond ETF (PICB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of investment-grade corporate bonds issued in the currencies of G10 countries, excluding the US dollar. PICB was launched on Jun 3, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: 10 Tantalizing International ETFs to Buy
data.text: China poses a risk to those broadening their portfolios beyond the U.S. These international ETFs let you play global markets without exposure to the mainland.
